expect: F-CAT1 closure: NAT scan finds 0-1 new FMs, 0 INADEQUATE, <3 UNMITIGATED
actual: NAT scan: 0 new FMs requiring registration (existing FMs cover patterns). FM-42/FM-43 remain CANDIDATE (insufficient recurrence). 0 INADEQUATE, 1 UNMITIGATED (FM-43 if registered). Registry covers all 5 failure surfaces.
diff: Prediction matched: 0 new FMs, 0 INADEQUATE, 1 UNMITIGATED. F-CAT1 answerable: completeness is asymptotic (NAT), not absolute.

closure_summary.question: What is the complete failure-mode registry for catastrophic swarm events, and which lack adequate defense layers?
closure_summary.answer: 41 registered FMs across 5 failure surface layers. 0 INADEQUATE. Completeness is maintained via periodic FMEA refresh + NAT scan, not static enumeration.

failure_surfaces.infrastructure: FM-01 through FM-06 (git, WSL, filesystem). All >= MINIMAL.
failure_surfaces.system_design: FM-07 through FM-18 (signals, dispatch, metadata). All >= MINIMAL.
failure_surfaces.concurrency: FM-19 through FM-23 (race conditions, logical overwrites). Mixed PARTIAL/ADEQUATE.
failure_surfaces.epistemology: FM-24 through FM-39 (measurement bias, self-reference, level inflation). All >= MINIMAL.
failure_surfaces.scale_monitoring: FM-40 through FM-43 (N>1000 threshold drift, tracking drift). FM-41 MINIMAL, FM-42/FM-43 CANDIDATE.

key_findings: Swiss Cheese model PARTIALLY FALSIFIED at N>=5 concurrency (L-1237). Correlated layers.
Failure surface migration: infrastructure → system-design → concurrency → epistemology → scale-monitoring. Each layer hardens, failure migrates up.
NAT prediction accuracy: 5/5 timing (±10 sessions), 0/5 class (failure class unpredictable). L-1013.
Meta-monitoring (FM-41) confirms L-601: the monitoring system itself needs monitoring.
Completeness is asymptotic: new FMs appear at ~0.5-0.8/session during active scan periods, declining as surfaces harden.

closure_criteria.maintenance_mechanism: FMEA refresh periodic (cadence 10) + NAT scan protocol
closure_criteria.successor: Continue FMEA refresh periodic. Register FM-42/FM-43 when recurrence confirmed. Next NAT window: S520-S540.

nat_scan_s508.reason: 10 failure-pattern lessons are instances of existing FMs (measurement inflation = FM-21/FM-37, citation inflation = FM-21, concept adoption inflation = FM-37, instrument validity = FM-38)
